## Meeting Purpose

[Review ICP criteria and current sales pipeline to align on client prioritization and qualification process.](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New ICP criteria and scoring matrix being developed to better qualify potential clients](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Agreement to be more selective with early-stage companies due to higher risk and misaligned expectations](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)
  - [Deal Desk channel to be used more actively for collaborative deal evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=2488.0)
  - [Need for clearer, more decisive qualification criteria to streamline decision-making](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=3516.0)

## Topics

### Current Pipeline Review

  - [Several deals in progress (Airbyte, Redis, Cresta, TrueLook, Magic, Tango, Obsidian, Norm, Zapier, Navon, Tavis, Brex)](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Varying stages of engagement and alignment across deals](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Some technical/procurement challenges being worked through](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)

### ICP Criteria Development

  - [George creating matrix with 5 key dimensions to identify ideal clients](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Dimensions include: DRI/champion, content complexity, audience clarity, technical depth, company maturity](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [Scoring system and actionable materials for sales/delivery being developed](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=2908.0)
  - [Team provided feedback on criteria and potential "non-starters"](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=1558.0)

### Early-Stage Company Challenges

  - [Debate around working with seed-stage companies like BlackSoul](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
  - [Concerns: higher churn risk, unrealistic expectations, pivoting business models](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)
  - [Agreement to be more selective and push early-stage to waitlist when possible](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=2084.0)

### Deal Evaluation Process

  - [Will use Deal Desk channel more actively to collaboratively evaluate deals](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=2488.0)
  - [Plan to get ME/MD input on technical content feasibility](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=3486.0)
  - [Need for clearer go/no-go criteria to reduce "analysis paralysis"](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=3516.0)

### Client Expectations Management

  - [Importance of aligning on 3/6/12 month goals and realistic timelines](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=3112.0)
  - [Challenge of communicating typical ROI due to situational factors](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=3168.0)
  - [Need to refine waitlist/breakup messaging to maintain professionalism](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=3087.0)

## Next Steps

  - [George to finalize ICP matrix, scoring system, and sales materials](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=2908.0)
  - [Tyler to use Deal Desk more actively for deal evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=2488.0)
  - [Develop more specific criteria for disqualifying early-stage companies](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=3516.0)
  - [Refine waitlist/expectation setting language for prospects](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=3087.0)
  - [Consider designating ME/MD to evaluate technical content feasibility](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=3486.0)
  - [Tyler to conduct deeper qualification on pipeline deals using new criteria](https://fathom.video/share/vMxZW1LMxmDns6tvxi4QLRDbXs5weexk?tab=summary&timestamp=3711.0)
